feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red reached Celadon Rocket Hideout B3F.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red identified B3F as Rocket's Lift Key chamber and warned that the admin is guarding the elevator route.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill found a Nexus Order elevator trace hidden under Rocket's B3F wiring.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The Rocket Admin Lift Key battle is unlocked.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: A Gold Dust ledger recovered on B3F hints that multiple factions are pricing Rocket's stolen research.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Moonlight's sleep panel is wired into Rocket's B3F alarm system.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Giovanni's elevator route has been found, but the Lift Key is still required.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The B3F Rocket Admin has been defeated.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman obtained the Rocket Lift Key.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rocket Hideout elevator path unlocked. Giovanni's Celadon route is exposed.
